chunks.title: Regulations for the Prince and People
chunks.reason: A continuous legal section detailing gate usage, sacrificial offerings for Sabbaths and new moons, and daily provisions.

chunks.title: Inheritance Laws for the Prince
chunks.reason: A distinct legal unit governing the prince's right to give inheritance to sons versus servants.

chunks.title: The Priestly Kitchens and Outer Courts
chunks.reason: A narrative vision segment describing the tour of the inner chambers for boiling sacrifices and the outer court corners.
